prompt: Aesthetic food photography of a delicious meal (rice bowl / noodles / curry / grilled meat) on a table, shot from slightly above, warm cozy lighting, vibrant colors, soft depth of field. Add cute hand-drawn doodle illustrations on top of the food: tiny smiling faces on ingredients, blush cheeks, little arms, hearts, sparkles, arrows, and playful annotations. Include handwritten text phrases like “{argument name="caption" default="Sunday fuel”}, “comfort on a plate”, “so happy!”}, in a casual marker/brush style. Clean Instagram-style composition, cozy restaurant or cafe background, high detail textures, glossy food highlights, kawaii aesthetic, storytelling layout, ultra-realistic photo + illustrated overlay mix, 4K
